lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. It has major mechanical issues and will require extensive repairs to be fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear and aging on the seats and carpets. The engine runs, but the vehicle will need routine maintenance and minor repairs in the near future.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, showroom-quality shine and no imperfections, scratches, or dents. Inside, the interior is equally immaculate, with leather seats that look and feel brand new and a dashboard free of any wear. All mechanical systems and electronic features function perfectly, exactly as they did when the car first left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in showroom state, offering a like-new driving experience for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver for several years. While it remains mechanically operational and drives consistently, the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scuffs on the rear bumper and a few small dings on the passenger side doors. The interior is clean but shows expected wear on the upholstery and floor mats from regular use. It has been maintained regularly, though it lacks some of the modern refinements found in newer models. This is a solid choice for anyone seeking a functional, honest vehicle at an accessible price point.

Check out this fantastic find! This vehicle is in wonderful condition and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It drives smoothly and looks great, showing only some minor, honest signs of regular use that you'd expect. It’s a reliable, high-quality ride that’s ready for many more miles of adventures. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that still feels fresh and performs beautifully, this is the one for you!

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak operational performance. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and enduring reliability, this vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in prime condition for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, so you can totally count on it for all your upcoming road trips! Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is nice and clean. I’m looking for a quick, easy sale to a great new owner, so come take it for a spin and see for yourself how great it feels on the road!
This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies, mated to a precise
Used car in good condition. Recent inspection passed. Reliable daily driver. Available now.

Experience a vehicle that has been treated with the utmost respect. This car presents beautifully, with a vibrant exterior that retains its original showroom shine, save for a few minor, barely-visible stone chips consistent with light use. The interior is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of rips or stains, and every button and feature operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine purrs with the reliability of a well-documented service history, ensuring a smooth and responsive driving experience. It’s a turn-key opportunity for anyone seeking a dependable, high-quality ride that looks and feels much newer than its age.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, the unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and remains in commendable condition throughout. It offers a sophisticated driving experience for the pragmatic buyer who demands reliability without sacrificing prestige.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-appointed interior. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise. This offering represents significant value for the discerning motorist who prioritizes both reliability and sophisticated engineering.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that still looks and feels great? This beauty has been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure. It runs like a dream and is in really solid shape—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways! I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The power is managed through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. This example has been mechanically sorted with a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, ensuring structural and timing reliability. The suspension geometry remains true, providing the telepathic steering feedback and 50/50 weight distribution this chassis is renowned for. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the drivetrain and cooling system are in robust health, making this a turn-key driver’s car for the serious enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Minor wear on interior. Runs smooth.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-maintained driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, featuring supple upholstery and a dashboard where every button and digital display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been treated to regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance, resulting in a smooth engine note and crisp gear shifts. The tires possess ample tread, and the braking system provides firm, confident stops. With a clean title in hand and a comprehensive service history, this car offers a refined driving experience and the peace of mind that comes from a history of responsible care.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle demonstrates exceptional mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously serviced and maintained to rigorous standards, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. A premier selection for the individual who demands reliability without compromising on professional presentation.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies automotive integrity and reliable performance. This specimen offers an exceptional balance of luxury and utility, having undergone rigorous internal inspections to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical soundness and aesthetic appeal. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and longevity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks and feels fantastic? You've found it! This car has been so well-loved and is in wonderful shape, ready for all your upcoming adventures. It runs like a dream and is super comfortable for those long drives. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy! Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Offering a mechanically robust E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This driver-focused example utilizes a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox delivering power through a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains balanced with responsive MacPherson struts and a multi-link rear setup, benefiting from recent subframe reinforcement and a cooling system refresh. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the powertrain maintains high compression and its signature 8,000 RPM redline. A superb platform for the purist seeking peak naturally aspirated longitudinal performance.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that perfectly balances performance with comfort. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers consistent power, paired with a responsive transmission that handles both city streets and highway cruising with ease. The exterior retains a deep shine, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of careful use, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the upholstery is supportive with no major wear, and all power features—including the dual-zone climate control and premium audio system—function exactly as they should. Regularly serviced with a documented history, this car has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter. It offers a solid, rattle-free ride that speaks to its mechanical integrity and long-term reliability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies reliability and enduring performance. Presented in commendable condition, it features a comprehensive service history and has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of prestige and proven durability.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, maintained to a rigorous standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its consistent performance and well-preserved interior appointments. Representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, this vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our dealership’s exacting criteria for quality and long-term reliability.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape. It runs great and has been well-loved, making it the perfect choice for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver that's ready to hit the road today. I’m honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know it’s going to make the next owner super happy! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all!

This E92 M3 represents a prime example of the high-revving S65 V8 era, featuring a 4.0L naturally aspirated powerplant with an 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. The mechanical specification includes the M-Variable differential lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for optimized lateral dynamics. Preventative maintenance is up to date, with recent rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service ensuring long-term reliability. The chassis remains taut, showcasing the precision of its aluminum subframes and multi-link rear suspension. While the aesthetic reflects its status as a driven machine, the drivetrain remains potent with linear power delivery and crisp shifts from the 6-speed manual transmission.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a well-maintained, reliable, and stylish ride. The exterior retains a beautiful, deep luster, showing only the minor, expected road wear of a carefully driven car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal creasing and a dashboard where every button and display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is in robust health; it has been serviced regularly with a comprehensive maintenance log to prove it, including a recent oil service and a thorough multi-point inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet journey. This is a turn-key vehicle that balances premium features with exceptional value, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. It offers a refined driving experience, characterized by dependable performance and a well-preserved aesthetic. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury and long-term value.
